subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! Great is this Day and mighty is this Cause, that the ears of the peoples of the world may be delivered from hearkening unto the tales of old and that which the nations possess [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم یوم بزرگیست و امر بزرگ تا آذان اهل عالم از اصغای قصص اولی و ما عند الامم
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @rejection, opposition and persecution
